findings.description: The knowledge file appends three XML closing tags (`</list>`, `</property>`, `</component>`) to complete the code example, but these tags are not present in the source file's code block. The source code block ends at `<component-ref name="sessionStoreHandler" />` without any closing tags.
findings.source_evidence: Source code block ends with: `<component-ref name="multipartHandler"/>\n        <component-ref name="sessionStoreHandler" />` — no closing tags follow.
